queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the absence of a checking account as a credit risk driver contributing to elevated default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Determinants of default investigation into how savings account balances below one hundred DM serve as a mitigating factor in credit risk assessment.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance between 0 and 200 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the impact of a checking account balance between zero and two hundred DM on increased credit risk exposure.
